source_metadata.title: 2025/03/06 - Petitions
source_metadata.description:
Petition of Ann Chapman: Amend the HART Act to allow more flexible timeframes for embryo/gamete storage

Hearing of Evidence:

Ann Chapman

ACART:

Debra Wilson, Chair


Fertility Associates:

 Suzanne Sherwin, General Manager


Ministry of Health:

Saskia Patton, Manager, Ethics


Ministry of Justice:

Helen McDonald, Manager, Policy Group
Jennie Marjoribanks, Principal Advisor, Policy Group


RANZCOG:

Prof Cindy Farquhar, Dean of Research & Policy
